text.title: vui-iot-integration Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for vui-iot-integration as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLM-generated utterance lists drift to single phrasing; developers accept the first output without forcing variants.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Users speak in natural, varied language. Over-training on a single utterance produces cascading NLU failures.

failure-mode.description: Agents skip undo and partial-failure paths in the output, treating them as optional.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Voice-initiated multi-device changes are hard to reverse; undo and explicit partial-failure reporting are essential for user trust.

failure-mode.description: Vendor capability matrices are cached in the prompt or RAG without version pinning; matrices change between quarters.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Matter cluster IDs, Alexa capability interfaces, and Google Home traits evolve. Agents hallucinate unsupported utterances if the matrix is stale.

failure-mode.description: Agents auto-deploy a routine that touches locks, alarms, garage, or thermostat extremes without human approval.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Voice-initiated safety-critical actions need human verification to prevent accidents or unauthorized control.

failure-mode.description: Voice transcripts in vendor cloud are treated as ephemeral; agents echo full transcripts in logs or prompts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Transcripts are PII persisting on vendor cloud. Echoing them violates privacy and creates regulatory exposure.

failure-mode.description: Agents hallucinate Matter cluster IDs without grounding via chip-tool discovery.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Matter cluster IDs are numeric and not intuitive. LLMs freely invent them; use chip-tool to ground truth.
